purpose: Local-only Node.js repository hygiene hints for agents and maintainers.
safe_start: Read package.json scripts before choosing commands.
Prefer the repo's existing package manager based on the committed lockfile.
Do not install dependencies, rewrite lockfiles, or create node_modules unless the human explicitly asks.

command_hints.name: npm-test
command_hints.when: package.json has a test script and npm is the selected package manager

command_hints.name: npm-lint
command_hints.when: package.json has a lint script and npm is the selected package manager

non_goals: No hosted package registry access by default.
